themes.name: [Negative] App Issues, Security Concerns, and Poor User Experience

quotes.text: I have big trust issues as I observed couple of issues today and previously also but that time I ignored.
They fail to track credit card bills.
Unable to invest in our stock sip
I have sold some shares for urgent money. I cannot see my wallet or cash available for withdrawel.
Indmoney added so many feature chart everything that traders and investors need. I love this protect position feature we can move the Stop loss just by moving in chart like MT5 is good one.
why do you keep changing interfaces and each change is making it worse. 2 years ago the interface was clear and simple everything was just below the stock charts.
the new update has a very bad UI and UX. Portfolio is not selected by default. Added one extra step to check the portfolio.
What the hell are you guys doing?
Please roll back your latest updates. The previous one was much better. This one doesn’t have sort capabilities. Doesn’t show pre and post market or current US market performance either
the new UI of ur app is literally so confusing a investor just need a simple UI which can be easy and fast
very very Bad chor he ye aplication
one of the worst apps I ever used
unable to install app after doing all options
I don't know why but I am unable to open the app it is not opening at all it keep exiting on its own

themes.description: Users complained about various issues including app crashes, poor performance, unreliable transactions, delayed fund transfers, incorrect auto-linked bank account information, and lack of transparency in withdrawal and conversion processes. There are also concerns about data security and potential misuse of customer information. Additionally, users expressed disappointment with the app's user interface, lack of advanced features, and poor customer support experience.
themes.business_impact: High customer churn risk due to reliability concerns, potential financial losses, damage to brand reputation, and negative word-of-mouth.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: The root cause of these issues is a lack of attention to detail, inadequate testing, and a general disregard for user experience. This is likely due to a lack of effective communication and collaboration between different teams, leading to a fragmented product development process.
themes.action_plan: • Conduct thorough user testing and gather feedback to identify and prioritize issues. Implement agile development processes to ensure timely and effective resolution of problems. Enhance customer support through dedicated agents, timely responses, and proactive issue resolution. Implement data security measures to protect user information and prevent potential misuse.
